creator: dateck@ludd.luth.se
text:
According to Poul-Henning Kamp:
> 
> How can you tell for sure that ntpd is the culprit ?
> 

When it is running my computer deadlocks, and when it is not running 
my computer can run for days.

It was right after xntpd changed name to ntpd that I discovered it, 
I noticed that xntpd wasn't running so I changed the rc files so it would use
ntpd instead of xntpd and to my suprise my computer started to die all the 
time.
So it is realy ntpd that casuses it, however it might need help of something 
else in the system, so if you have any suggestions or things you want me to 
try, I'll do it.

regards

/Tomas

--
